message:
test(serve): batch 38 — WSEventStore DB errors, RBAC, finalize, sendPong

9 tests covering:
- WSEventStore.cleanup DB exec error (91.7→100%)
- WSEventStore.Store DB persist error (log & continue)
- WSEventStore.GetSince DB query error (getFromDB)
- WSEventStore.getFromDB cursor-too-old reset (88.5→92.3%)
- WSEventStore.GetDroppedStats query error (88.9→94.4%)
- redactingResponseWriter.finalize double-call (94.7→100%)
- WSClient.sendPong full buffer
- Role.HasPermission unknown role (85.7→100%)
- checkWSOrigin allowed origin with empty scheme

Coverage: 82.7% → 82.8%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
